title: Landing
narration: Welcome to Sumaya Engage 360, an enterprise platform for hiring, onboarding, and managing the full employee lifecycle. This multi-tenant SaaS gives each company an isolated workspace. The landing page introduces the product and links to login and public careers.

title: Careers Public
narration: Candidates apply through public careers pages, one per hiring client. Each job card shows title, location, skills, and an Apply Now form. Applications flow directly into HR's pipeline without requiring a login.

title: Login
narration: Staff sign in with tenant subdomain, email, and password. Platform administrators leave the tenant field empty. After authentication, users land in the application shell with modules filtered by their assigned roles.

title: Tenant Admin Dashboard
narration: As a tenant admin, The dashboard aggregates live KPIs—open jobs, applications, headcount, and pending approvals—with tiles that drill into underlying data. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Reports
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Reports provides a catalogue of KPI definitions. Select a report code, set filters, and run to generate on-screen analytics with export options. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Settings
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Settings configures tenant-wide options: branding, approval thresholds, integrations, and feature toggles managed by tenant admins and HR. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Catalogues
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Catalogues hold reference data seeded for the tenant—skills, document types, policy templates, and other master lists used across modules. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Requirements
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Requirements tracks implementation coverage against the product specification, useful during rollout and compliance reviews. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Audit
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: The audit trail records privileged actions across the tenant—who changed what and when—for governance and security reviews. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Execution
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Execution evidence captures proof that configured workflows and controls were exercised, supporting audits and go-live checklists. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Users
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: User accounts creates staff logins for HR, managers, interviewers, and BGC vendors—separate from employee records created through hiring. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Clients
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Hiring clients represent who you recruit for—internal business units or external staffing clients—each with its own public careers URL. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Jobs
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Jobs lets HR create requisitions, define skills and interview rounds, and publish openings to the careers site when ready. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Candidates
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: The talent pool stores all candidates and parsed resume data, enabling reuse and matching when new jobs are published. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Applications
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Applications is the ATS pipeline—track status from applied through interview, offer, onboarding, and hired, with interview evidence. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Employees
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: The employee directory lists active staff with export options. HR and admins maintain records; managers get read access to their teams. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Onboarding
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Onboarding manages new-joiner cases after offer acceptance, coordinating documents, policies, and conversion to employee records. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Preboarding Admin
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Preboarding configures the new-hire portal checklist—required documents and policies candidates complete before day one. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Org
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Departments shows the org structure, headcount per unit, and department head assignments used in approvals and exit workflows. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Exit
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Exit management handles resignations and offboarding—clearance, NOC sign-offs, and separation tasks through the employee lifecycle end. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Projects
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Projects tracks client engagements and staffing—link employees to billable work for timesheets and manpower planning. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Manpower
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Manpower planning views allocation across projects, highlighting bench, utilization, and demand versus supply. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Assets
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Assets registers laptops, phones, and equipment issued to employees, with assignment and return tracking. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Leave
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Attendance and leave covers holiday calendars, leave balances, requests, and manager approvals in one module. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Timesheets
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Timesheets capture weekly hours against projects. Employees submit; managers review and approve before payroll consumption. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Payroll
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Payroll runs salary processing and payslip distribution. HR initiates runs; employees view their own payslips securely. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Benefits
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Benefits manages enrollment in health, insurance, and perk programmes with eligibility rules and employee self-service. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Expenses
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Expenses handles reimbursement claims—submit receipts, route for approval, and track settlement status. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Goals
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Goals supports OKRs and targets aligned to appraisal cycles, visible to employees and their reporting managers. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Appraisals
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Appraisals runs performance review cycles with ratings, feedback, and calibration across the organisation. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Trainings
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Trainings catalogues courses, schedules sessions, and tracks completion for compliance and skill development. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Recognition
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Recognition enables peer and manager appreciation, badges, and 360-degree feedback to drive engagement. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Approvals
narration: As a tenant admin, The approvals inbox is a unified queue for leave, timesheets, expenses, and workflow tasks awaiting action. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Workflows
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Workflows defines approval chains and automation rules that route requests to the right approvers by designation. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Notifications
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Notifications configures email and in-app alerts for key events—offers, approvals, and policy updates. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Org Masters
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Org masters maintains locations, grades, cost centres, and other structural reference data for HR operations. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Masters
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Masters provides additional lookup tables—leave types, expense categories, and module-specific enumerations. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Privacy
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Privacy and consent handles data-subject requests, policy acknowledgements, and GDPR-style rights for employees. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Profile
narration: As a tenant admin, My profile shows the signed-in user's account details, linked employee record, and password preferences. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.

title: Tenant Admin Reports Run
narration: From the tenant admin perspective: Running a report executes the query against live data and displays generated results with timestamps for auditability. Notice the application shell: grouped navigation on the left, module header with breadcrumbs and tabs, and the signed-in user with role badges at the bottom.
